raw_consumer_statement:
The account name is XXXX XXXX XXXX. 

This compliant against American Express comes because they allowed XXXX to charge our credit card that was stored on file at XXXX without our permission. 

We did not authorize these charges with XXXX on XX/XX/year>. These were fraudulent charges and we notified American Express in advance that XXXX was trying to process a charge that was not authorized by us but American Express paid it any way. We did not authorized these charges and we do not owe American Express. They should not have allowed those charges to take place with XXXX.
